title: Assignment to array does not work with intra-assignment delay

features.name: unpacked array element non-blocking assignment with intra-assignment delay
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to an unpacked array element using intra-assignment delay syntax where the delay value is greater than zero

features.name: intra-assignment delay with array index as assignment target
features.description: Code should include an intra-assignment delay where the target is an array element accessed via an index variable rather than a literal
